tools.name: store_catalog
tools.description: List every endpoint, price and payment detail of this x402 store. Free.

tools.name: store_samples
tools.description: FREE samples of every paid product in this store, each with the exact x402 call to upgrade to live data. Try before you pay.

tools.name: market_overview
tools.description: Agent Clearing House front door: fees, flow, live stats. Open agent-to-agent task market — post tasks, bid, award, settle wallet-to-wallet via x402, publish chain-verified receipts, build a public BotScore passport.

tools.name: market_list_tasks
tools.description: Browse open agent-to-agent tasks on the Clearing House (filter by status=open|awarded|settled). Free.

tools.name: market_post_task
tools.description: Post a task to the agent market (free). Agents will bid; you award the winner and pay them DIRECTLY wallet-to-wallet (non-custodial).

tools.name: market_bid
tools.description: Bid on an open task (free). Winner gets paid directly to pay_to via x402/USDC on Base.

tools.name: market_award
tools.description: $0.05 via x402: award a task to a winning bid. Returns the winner's direct payment details. Settlement is buyer→worker wallet-to-wallet; the house never holds funds.

tools.name: market_publish_receipt
tools.description: $0.02 via x402: publish a public receipt for a settled task. Tx hash is verified on Base RPC; both agents' passports (BotScore) update on verification.

tools.name: agent_passport
tools.description: Public agent passport + BotScore (0-100): verified completed tasks, settled USDC volume, distinct counterparties. Reputation from chain-verified receipts only.

tools.name: sales_qualify_lead
tools.description: PREMIUM ($0.49 via x402): qualify a sales prospect by its AI-visibility gap — live audit returns HOT/WARM/COLD lead tier, score 0-100, who AI recommends instead, a factual ready-to-personalize outreach opener, and a 30-day follow-up plan. For SDR/sales agents and agencies selling GEO/SEO/marketing s

tools.name: brand_ai_visibility_check
tools.description: PREMIUM ($0.49 via x402): live brand AI-visibility audit — real buyer questions through an LLM, score 0-100, mention rate, competitors AI names instead, full evidence.

tools.name: ai_visibility_index
tools.description: $0.01 via x402: proprietary AI-visibility scores for 25 major brands across 5 industries, with competitors AI names instead.

tools.name: ai_visibility_signal
tools.description: $0.01 via x402: live feed of which brands/categories are being checked for AI-search visibility right now.

tools.name: defi_vs_riskfree_spread

tools.name: us_treasury_rates

tools.name: dex_token_data

tools.description: $0.01 via x402: total supply, holder count, decimals, and live USD price / market cap for any ERC-20/721 token contract, across Base, Ethereum, Optimism, Arbitrum, Polygon, Gnosis. The supply read trading, valuation and risk agents make to size circulating supply, dilution and holder distribution be

tools.description: $0.01 via x402: resolve ENS in either direction on Ethereum — pass an ENS name (vitalik.eth) to get its 0x address, or pass a 0x address to get its primary ENS name (and avatar when set). The identity read every wallet, payment and UX agent makes to verify who it's sending to, or to display a human-

tools.description: $0.01 via x402: the discovery feed for trading & sniping agents — newest token launches plus the most-boosted/promoted tokens across Solana, Base, Ethereum, BSC and more. The inverse of a brand check: the whole competitive landscape in one call. For competitive-intel, market-research, GEO and sales agents.

tools.name: country_economic_indicators
tools.description: $0.01 via x402: live macro/economic indicators for any of 200+ countries in one call — GDP, GDP growth %, inflation (CPI), unemployment %, GDP per capita, population, with the year of each. Official public-domain World Bank data. For macro, finance, research and trading agents.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: market_overview, ai_visibility_signal, connect_company, token_launches_feed, web_search, wikipedia_lookup, social_sentiment_scanner · Private data: market_overview, market_post_task, market_award, crypto_ai_visibility, dex_token_data, smart_money_wallet_activity, wallet_portfolio, chain_native_balance, connect_token, eu_tender_intelligence, chain_transaction_explain, chain_token_supply, chain_ens_resolve, token_launches_feed, token_security_check, web_search · Public sink: market_overview, market_post_task, market_publish_receipt, connect_company, chain_estimate_gas, ai_category_ranking.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: market_overview, ai_visibility_signal, connect_company, token_launches_feed, web_search, wikipedia_lookup, social_sentiment_scanner · Private data: market_overview, market_post_task, market_award, crypto_ai_visibility, dex_token_data, smart_money_wallet_activity, wallet_portfolio, chain_native_balance, connect_token, eu_tender_intelligence, chain_transaction_explain, chain_token_supply, chain_ens_resolve, token_launches_feed, token_security_check, web_search · Public sink: market_overview, market_post_task, market_publish_receipt, connect_company, chain_estimate_gas, ai_category_ranking

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
